## Category
**Cluster:** Cloud Security

---

## Product Brief
1. Wiz offers an AI Application Protection Platform for end-to-end security of AI applications.
2. Their core technology provides context to security and development teams to understand cyber risks and secure the software supply chain from code to cloud.
3. Wiz differentiates by enabling organizations to discover and govern third-party dependencies and AI tooling across the SDLC, integrating cloud and code context for faster remediation.

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- Launch of the new Wiz AI Application Protection Platform at RSAC 2026.
- Executive roundtables exploring how AI is transforming cloud security and the threat landscape.
- Google's completed acquisition of Wiz to build a comprehensive, AI-ready cybersecurity platform.

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] How does the new AI Application Protection Platform integrate with existing cloud security tools?
- [ ] What are the key strategies for securing the AI-accelerated software supply chain?
- [ ] Can you demonstrate how Wiz provides unified visibility across multi-cloud and code environments?
